sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103369" key="tetraermh=s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετρα-ερμῆς</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n103369.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">four-sided herm</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33.6</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(iii A.D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
